Comment: If you are lucky enough to get a class with Dr. Hatch, do not make the mistake of being lazy. He is extremely hands-on when you make an effort to reach out, but he is as ruthless as Caligula if you aren't making any effort in his class. Speak to him, do

[Robert Hatch] t making any effort in his class. Speak to him, don't be hateful, and you will have an amazing time.

Comment: Professor Hatch is great at explaining concepts in an easily understandable manner. He gives homewor

[Robert Hatch] an easily understandable manner. He gives homework regularly, but it's never too tough. His tests are challenging, but he grades them fairly. If you don't write a syntactically perfect piece of code, but the idea/logic is present, expect to still earn a decent amount of points.

Quality: 5/5 | Difficulty: 5/5 | Would Take Again: Yes
Tags: Clear grading criteria--Inspirational--Accessible outside class
Comment: He is available to help at practically any

[David Frazier] mment: He is available to help at practically any hour and is always happy to do so. Exams are usually short answer style instead of multiple choice, which forces you to know what you're talking about— you can't just guess— which is how it should be! He is fair, encouraging, and rewards hardwork. I wish I could clone him for every class, lol.
